name: jaymag
rider_type: Explosive sprinter on an under-developed aerobic engine

session_template.Tue: Structured quality (threshold / VO2) - controllable, outdoor by power targets
session_template.Thu: Race-pace group ride (hard, variable) + ice hockey at night
session_template.Sat: Long aerobic / gravel - durability builder (longest ride of week)
session_template.Sun: Endurance (moderate) - aerobic volume, keep it controlled

coaching_notes: Only 4 rides/week and one long day: every session must earn its place, minimal junk miles.
Thursday is a big stacked-load day (race-pace group ride + hockey). Friday must stay recovery.
Two hard days (Tue, Thu) plus weekend volume leaves recovery on Mon/Wed/Fri - watch monotony.
Sprint is already a strength; spend almost no programmed time on it.
Outdoor only: intervals run on power targets by feel, plan tolerates weather moving sessions.
